title: PaymentEvent
description: Domain event emitted by the OpenFedNow Kafka event bus when a payment changes lifecycle state. See ADR-0006 for the versioning strategy.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version of this event. Duplicated in the Kafka X-Schema-Version header. Producers stamp this from PaymentEvent.CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION at publish time.

eventType.description: Discriminator for which lifecycle transition this event represents. New values may be added in minor versions; consumers must treat unknown values as 'skip and alert' rather than fatal.

transactionId.description: ISO 20022 TransactionId from the originating pacs.008. Used as the Kafka partition key so events for the same payment land in order on a single partition.

endToEndId.description: ISO 20022 EndToEndId — the deduplication identifier assigned by the originating institution.

amount.description: Interbank settlement amount serialized as a decimal string (e.g. '100.00') to preserve precision. Always positive; direction is implied by eventType.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the settlement amount. USD for FedNow and RTP.

rejectReasonCode.description: ISO 20022 reason code populated only on rejection events (INBOUND_PAYMENT_REJECTED, OUTBOUND_PAYMENT_REJECTED). Examples: AM04 (insufficient funds), AC01 (invalid account), AC04 (closed account), NARR (narrative), XPIR (expired/timeout).

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 instant at which the lifecycle transition was recorded by the framework, in UTC.
